recentHighlights: Past Tense, Part I (S3E11) — the bell riots and sanctuary districts as a mirror of structural exclusion; the episode's prescient 2024 setting and what it says about who gets written out of history
Through the Looking Glass (S3E10) — mirror universe as a test of whether character survives context; the recurring question of whether identity holds across radically different circumstances
Defiant (S3E09) — Tom Riker's appropriation of the Defiant raises questions of identity inheritance and whether a duplicate has the same rights as the original
Meridian (S3E08) — a planet that phases between dimensions every 60 years; the ethical calculus of leaving a community vs. being left behind by time
